name: microstarplatform
description: MicroStarPlatform — Azure-native PWA for daily micro-achievements (DMTA → STAR)

scripts.dev:prepare: node scripts/ensure-local-settings.mjs && pnpm --filter @microstar/shared build && pnpm --filter @microstar/api build
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:prepare && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:swa: pnpm run dev:prepare && concurrently -k -n web,swa -c green,magenta "pnpm run dev:web" "npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli@2 start http://localhost:5173 --api-location api --port 4280"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @microstar/shared build && node scripts/write-architecture-mock.mjs && pnpm -r --filter !@microstar/shared build
